sentences.text: 我每天{吃/喝/买}苹果。
sentences.translation: I eat apples every day.

sentences.text: 她{喝/吃/看}水。
sentences.translation: She drinks water.

sentences.text: 他是{学生/苹果/猫}。
sentences.translation: He is a student.

sentences.text: 这本{书/猫/水}很好。
sentences.translation: This book is very good.

sentences.text: 我有一只{猫/书/水}。
sentences.translation: I have a cat.

sentences.text: 老师{教/买/喝}我们中文。
sentences.translation: The teacher teaches us Chinese.

sentences.text: 我{喜欢/害怕/忘记}学习汉语。
sentences.translation: I like studying Chinese.

sentences.text: 他每天{工作/睡觉/唱歌}八个小时。
sentences.translation: He works eight hours every day.

sentences.text: 我{买了/卖了/送了}一本新书。
sentences.translation: I bought a new book.

sentences.text: 她{高兴/难过/生气}地笑了。
sentences.translation: She smiled happily.

sentences.text: 虽然天气很冷，{但是/所以/因为}他还是出去跑步了。
sentences.translation: Although the weather was cold, he still went out for a run.

sentences.text: 他{认真/随便/马虎}地准备了这次考试。
sentences.translation: He prepared carefully for this exam.

sentences.text: 这家{餐厅/超市/医院}的菜非常好吃。
sentences.translation: The food at this restaurant is delicious.

sentences.text: 我{已经/还没/从来}去过长城了。
sentences.translation: I have already been to the Great Wall.

sentences.text: 她{建议/要求/希望}我们多喝水。
sentences.translation: She suggested we drink more water.

sentences.text: 随着科技的{发展/衰退/停止}，生活越来越方便。
sentences.translation: With the development of technology, life is becoming increasingly convenient.

sentences.text: 他的演讲{引起/消除/忽视}了大家的注意。
sentences.translation: His speech attracted everyone's attention.

sentences.text: 这个问题{值得/不必/无法}认真考虑。
sentences.translation: This issue deserves careful consideration.

sentences.text: 她{坚持/放弃/中断}了多年的训练，终于获得了冠军。
sentences.translation: She persisted with years of training and finally won the championship.

sentences.text: 经济{全球化/本土化/私有化}带来了机遇，也带来了挑战。
sentences.translation: Economic globalisation has brought both opportunities and challenges.

sentences.text: 这项{政策/技术/研究}对减少贫困{产生/阻碍/忽视}了重要影响。
sentences.translation: This policy has had an important impact on reducing poverty.

sentences.text: 他的理论{颠覆/支持/延续}了人们长期以来的{认知/偏见/习惯}。
sentences.translation: His theory overturned long-held understanding.

sentences.text: 这部小说{深刻/肤浅/简单}地{揭示/隐藏/回避}了人性的复杂。
sentences.translation: This novel profoundly reveals the complexity of human nature.

sentences.text: 面对困难，他{毫不/稍微/逐渐}退缩，展现出{坚韧/懦弱/冷漠}的品质。
sentences.translation: Faced with difficulty, he did not retreat at all, demonstrating tenacity.

sentences.text: 在{信息/农业/工业}爆炸的时代，{批判性/被动性/感性}思维尤为重要。
sentences.translation: In the age of information explosion, critical thinking is especially important.

sentences.text: 这场{辩论/实验/调查}涉及{伦理/经济/美学}层面的深层矛盾。
sentences.translation: This debate touches on deep contradictions at the ethical level.

sentences.text: 该{政策/理论/模式}在{实施/讨论/否定}过程中暴露出诸多{漏洞/优势/可能}。
sentences.translation: The policy exposed numerous loopholes during its implementation.

sentences.text: 语言不仅是{交流/隔阂/竞争}的工具，更是{思维/情感/身份}的载体。
sentences.translation: Language is not only a tool for communication, but also a vehicle for thought.

sentences.text: 他的{著作/言论/行为}在学界引发了{广泛/短暂/片面}的{讨论/争议/共识}。
sentences.translation: His works triggered widespread debate in academic circles.

sentences.text: {资本/权力/技术}的{扩张/收缩/转移}往往以{公共利益/个人意志/市场需求}为代价。
sentences.translation: The expansion of capital often comes at the expense of the public interest.
